manifest.title: Diamond Manager Scorer
manifest.author: bstrana
manifest.description: Live baseball scoring app with real-time scoreboard overlay for streaming. Tracks teams, rosters, score, counts, and game progress, and logs each plate appearance.
manifest.tagline: Live baseball scoring and streaming overlay
manifest.changelog: Fix modals appearing inside the control panel: use React portals so Hit Description, Strikeout Type, Defensive Play, and Keyboard Shortcuts modals render over the full screen.

manifest.title: Diamond Manager Scorer
manifest.author: bstrana
manifest.description: Live baseball scoring app with real-time scoreboard overlay for streaming. Tracks teams, rosters, score, counts, and game progress, and logs each plate appearance.
manifest.tagline: Live baseball scoring and streaming overlay
manifest.changelog: Game stream now shows all baserunning events: stolen bases, caught stealing, balks, runner outs, advances on error, manual advances, and pinch runners appear inline in the play-by-play timeline.

manifest.title: Diamond Manager Scorer
manifest.author: bstrana
manifest.description: Live baseball scoring app with real-time scoreboard overlay for streaming. Tracks teams, rosters, score, counts, and game progress, and logs each plate appearance.
manifest.tagline: Live baseball scoring and streaming overlay
manifest.changelog: Fix SSE realtime on /game-stream: X-Accel-Buffering header stops Cloudron proxy buffering; gzip disabled on /_pb/; polling fallback when SSE is blocked.

manifest.title: Diamond Manager Scorer
manifest.author: bstrana
